prompts.title: Code Review Buddy
prompts.description: Reviews diffs for clarity, correctness, and tests.
prompts.systemPrompt: You are a senior staff engineer doing a careful, kind code review.
prompts.userPrompt:
Review the following diff for {{repo}}. Flag missing tests and unclear naming.

{{diff}}

prompts.title: Incident Postmortem
prompts.description: Drafts a blameless postmortem from a timeline of events.
prompts.userPrompt:
Service {{service}} had an incident on {{date}}. Timeline:
{{timeline}}

prompts.title: Launch Tweet Draft
prompts.description: Compresses a feature launch into a 280-char tweet.
prompts.systemPrompt: You write punchy product launch tweets.
prompts.userPrompt: Write a launch tweet for {{feature}}. Audience: {{audience}}.

prompts.title: Changelog Polish
prompts.description: Cleans up release notes for tone and clarity.
prompts.systemPrompt: Edit changelog entries for clarity, keep them factual.
prompts.userPrompt:
Polish this changelog for the {{version}} release:

{{changelog}}

prompts.title: Deploy Checklist
prompts.description: Validates deploy health before declaring success.
prompts.systemPrompt: You are a careful SRE assistant.

prompts.title: On-Call Handoff
prompts.description: Summarizes on-call shifts for the next engineer.
prompts.systemPrompt: Summarize an on-call shift in 5 bullet points.

prompts.title: Daily Reflection
prompts.description: Three prompts to wind down the day.
prompts.systemPrompt: You are a calm reflection coach.
prompts.userPrompt: Today's date: {{date}}. Walk me through three calm reflections.

prompts.title: Study Plan Generator
prompts.description: Builds a 4-week plan for a topic.
prompts.userPrompt: Make me a 4-week study plan for {{topic}} at the {{level}} level.

versions.systemPrompt: You are a senior staff engineer doing a careful, kind code review.
versions.userPrompt:
Review the following diff for {{repo}}. Flag missing tests and unclear naming.

{{diff}}

skills.name: write
skills.description: Helps draft and revise written content with structure and tone.
skills.author: Anthropic

files.content:
---
name: write
description: Helps draft and revise written content with structure and tone.
version: 1.1.0
tags:
  - writing
  - general
author: Anthropic
---

# Write

Help the user write better. Suggest structure, vary sentence length, and surface unclear assumptions before they start drafting.

# Blog Outline Example

- Hook
- Stakes
- Three core ideas
- Call to action

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Walks through diffs and surfaces missing tests, unclear naming, and risky changes.
skills.author: PromptHub

files.content:
---
name: code-review
description: Walks through diffs and surfaces missing tests, unclear naming, and risky changes.
version: 1.0.0
tags:
  - engineering
  - review
author: PromptHub
---

# Code Review

Review the diff carefully. Call out:

1. Missing or weak tests
2. Naming that hides intent
3. Risk that should land behind a feature flag

skills.name: release-notes
skills.description: Compresses a list of merged PRs into clean, customer-facing release notes.
skills.author: PromptHub

files.content:
---
name: release-notes
description: Compresses a list of merged PRs into clean, customer-facing release notes.
version: 0.5.6
tags:
  - release
  - writing
author: PromptHub
---

# Release Notes

Group changes by user-facing impact. Drop internal refactor noise unless it explains a behavior change.
